summary: Honest fallback for deferred CLUS-03. The notebook-grade noise re-clustering result cannot be shipped because normalized_distances(60,90,0.03).pkl exists in the workspace but is still 0 bytes, so this panel only exposes verified pre-reclustering statistics.

dropReasons.label: DBSCAN noise
dropReasons.narrative: These segments currently remain in the unrecovered noise pool and are the most truthful stand-in for deferred CLUS-03.

dropReasons.label: Non-top corridor
dropReasons.narrative: These segments formed minor directional families but were not promoted into the shipped top-K corridor runtime.

dropReasons.label: Too few points
dropReasons.narrative: These segments failed the minimum support threshold before any trustworthy re-clustering story could begin.

dropReasons.label: Too short
dropReasons.narrative: These segments were removed because displacement stayed below the current corridor extraction threshold.
